reviews.review_description: Today (6/8/26) I signed up for the annual plan which includes a free 2-week trial period. I was genuinely excited to use it on my new spin cycle. I had the following issues: the app was either unresponsive or very slow to respond. I tried exiting out of it and coming back in, but it it didn’t seem to help. Once it finally let me choose a course, it wouldn’t allow me to actually START the course. Upon finally responding and starting a course, it often registered my cycling rpm’s as 0 although I never stopped pedaling. Last, when I tried to end the ride early, the app wouldn’t let me exit because it was generally unresponsive again. I truly want this app to work out so I’m hoping that someone from support will reach out .  I don’t want to cancel the membership.

So happy to see BitGym on the Quest!!  It's great on my tablet, which I can screen share to my big screen in front of my bike, but now I can  have a bigger screen anywhere!  Been going upstairs to use the treadmill (bldg gym).  Thank you BitGym developers!
(I was using it on my Quest sometimes but  I had to connect it with a cable /HDMI capture card..... now I'm cordless !!!! )

reviews.review_title: What I have been waiting for!
reviews.review_description:
YAY! Finally BitGym has come to VR! Woohoo! This was the most exciting discovery ever! I have been using BitGym for quite some years now, but since getting my Meta Quest a few years ago, VR fitness games have taken up my exercise time, and my beloved BitGym that I used on my treadmill, sadly fell by the wayside in favour of using my Quest headset. No more! And this is so much better than using Fitbit on a TV monitor or tablet. Way, way better.  Huge curved screen, super sharp visually, and runs smooth as butter. 

Can use in Mixed Reality, or full immersion, while holding on to the treadmill arms. Amazing. I logged in to my Fitbit account after the download, and there was my Fitbit. Same as before. Just bigger, brighter, and better. Love it.
P.S. I put in my earbuds and played my favourite treadmill playlist from my Apple Music on my phone.
Thanks Fitbit!
A whole new level of working out, makes it so much easier and the tours are breath taking
